title: Stoneborn - EMMC
description: Even More Modded Compatibility for Stoneborn UI Overhaul by Sindavar. All covered mods are listed below.
body:
![Pack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6bbcaec7f7a9fee751a6a865d8095875505b5757.png)

# Stoneborn EMMC
This pack adds _**E**ven **M**ore **M**od **C**ompatibility_ from [Stoneborn UI Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stoneborn) to other mods. 


## List of supported mods
[AdditionZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/additionz)

[Camerapture](https://modrinth.com/mod/camerapture)

[Dimensional Doors](https://modrinth.com/mod/dimensionaldoors)

[Easy Magic](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-magic)

[Horseman](https://modrinth.com/mod/horseman)

[Immersive Aircraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft)

[Immersive Machinery](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-machinery)

[Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)

[Ringle's Gun Turret](https://modrinth.com/mod/ringles-gun-turret)

[Scout](https://modrinth.com/mod/scout)

[Small Ships](https://modrinth.com/mod/small-ships)

[Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries)

[Tide](https://modrinth.com/mod/tide)

[Tough As Nails](https://modrinth.com/mod/tough-as-nails)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

All credit goes to [Sindavar](https://modrinth.com/user/Sindavar) and the creators of these mods! All I did was continue their work. These Textures are mostly not mine
